attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LOOKUP_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LANG, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LOOKUP_CODE, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.MEANING, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.SOURCE_LANG, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.SECURITY_GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.VIEW_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.TERRITORY_CODE, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.TAG, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LEAF_NODE, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES,
 (
 select LOOKUP_TYPE ,LANG ,LOOKUP_CODE ,SECURITY_GROUP_ID ,VIEW_APPLICATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES
 minus
 select LOOKUP_TYPE ,LANG ,LOOKUP_CODE ,SECURITY_GROUP_ID ,VIEW_APPLICATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.LOOKUP_TYPE = STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LOOKUP_TYPE and ACM.LANG = STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LANG and ACM.LOOKUP_CODE = STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.LOOKUP_CODE and ACM.SECURITY_GROUP_ID = STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.SECURITY_GROUP_ID  and ACM.VIEW_APPLICATION_ID=STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.VIEW_APPLICATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES)
